issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate workflow branches, causing HAs and TCs to receive double tasks across post-referral and pre-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the association and filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks as needed.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred, including at least one deal marked lost on 2/26. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters to stop tasks from triggering on Closed Lost and Transferred deals.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering tasks for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference and display the previous LO's information rather than the updated one. The affected deal showed the old LO Paul instead of the new LO Julie Yocum. Luis investigated and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For any deals that had an LO change during the impact window, manually resend the agent-facing emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage reverts and returns to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then flipped back to a prior stage (e.g., Committed or Referred Active) due to a terminated contract, and then updated back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. This caused deals to fall off the radar without TCs receiving closing-info collection tasks. The fix was adding 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went through a second Offer Accepted transition during the impact window to ensure TC tasks are created.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving tasks to collect closing information. The issue was identified after multiple MRC deals were reported, and Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve it. MRC deals typically have no loan officer assigned, which may have been a contributing factor.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately 2/4/2026 and 4/1/2026 into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.
